approvalStep.description: Step 1 — Regional Telco Finance Director reviews the discount request. Must approve within 4 business hours or escalation fires via Flow Orchestrator TelcoApprovalEscalationOrchestration. See ADR-005.
approvalStep.label: Step 1 — Finance Director Review
approvalStep.name: Finance_Director_Review

approvalStep.description: Step 2 — Network Operations VP confirms discount is operationally sustainable. Final approval gate before quote is unlocked for Order creation. See ADR-005.
approvalStep.label: Step 2 — NetOps VP Confirmation
approvalStep.name: NetOps_VP_Confirmation

ApprovalProcess.description: 2-step sequential approval for telco quotes with manual discount greater than 20%. Step 1: Finance Director. Step 2: NetOps VP. 4-hour escalation SLA enforced by Flow Orchestrator TelcoApprovalEscalationOrchestration per ADR-005. Triggered programmatically via SubmitForTelcoApproval Invocable Action.
ApprovalProcess.label: Telco Discount Approval Process
